title: FormatMessage incorrectly used (Windows VFS)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, age INTEGER CHECK(age >= 0), email VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE);
INSERT INTO users (name, age, email) VALUES ('Alice', 30, 'alice@example.com');
INSERT INTO users (name, age, email) VALUES ('Bob', NULL, 'bob@example.com');
SELECT * FROM users WHERE age IS NULL OR age < 18;
UPDATE users SET age = age + 1 WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: Incorrect usage of FormatMessage in Windows VFS
